panels.title: Clusters

queries.query: SELECT count(distinct(k8s_cluster)) as "y_axis_1" FROM "kube_node_info" WHERE k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})

panels.title: Events

queries.query:
SELECT
  _timestamp,
  k8s_cluster                                                    AS cluster,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(k8s_namespace_name, ''), 'default')            AS namespace,
  body_object_type                                               AS type,
  body_object_reason                                             AS reason,
  body_object_note                                               AS message,
  body_object_regarding                                          AS regarding,
  body_object_reportingcontroller                                AS reporter,
  body_object_deprecatedcount                                    AS count,
  body_object_deprecatedlasttimestamp                            AS last_seen
FROM k8s_events
WHERE k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster}) AND body_object_kind = 'Event'
ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Kubernetes Clusters

queries.query:
SELECT 
    v.cluster,
    v.version,
    n.nodes,
    p.pod_statuses,
    cpu.cpu_usage_capacity,
    mem.mem_usage_capacity,
    pod.pod_usage_capacity
FROM (
    SELECT k8s_cluster AS cluster, MAX(kubelet_version) AS version
    FROM kube_node_info
    GROUP BY k8s_cluster
) v
JOIN (
    SELECT k8s_cluster AS cluster, COUNT(DISTINCT node) AS nodes
    FROM kube_node_info
    GROUP BY k8s_cluster
) n ON v.cluster = n.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Running'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (running) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Pending'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (pending) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Failed'    AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (failed) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Succeeded' AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (succeeded) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN value = 1           THEN pod END), ' (total)'
        ) AS pod_statuses
    FROM kube_pod_status_phase
    GROUP BY k8s_cluster
) p ON v.cluster = p.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        i.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND((1 - AVG(u.value)) * 100, 2), '% / ',
            ROUND(SUM(a.value), 1), ' cores total'
        ) AS cpu_usage_capacity
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT k8s_cluster, node FROM kube_node_info) AS i
    JOIN (SELECT node, MAX(value) AS value FROM kube_node_status_allocatable WHERE resource = 'cpu' GROUP BY node) AS a ON i.node = a.node
    JOIN (SELECT k8s_node_name, AVG(value) AS value FROM system_cpu_utilization WHERE state = 'idle' GROUP BY k8s_node_name) AS u ON i.node = u.k8s_node_name
    GROUP BY i.k8s_cluster
) cpu ON v.cluster = cpu.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        i.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(AVG(u.value) * 100, 2), '% / ',
            ROUND(SUM(a.value) / 1073741824, 1), ' GB total'
        ) AS mem_usage_capacity
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT k8s_cluster, node FROM kube_node_info) AS i
    JOIN (SELECT node, MAX(value) AS value FROM kube_node_status_allocatable WHERE resource = 'memory' GROUP BY node) AS a ON i.node = a.node
    JOIN (SELECT k8s_node_name, AVG(value) AS value FROM system_memory_utilization WHERE state = 'used' GROUP BY k8s_node_name) AS u ON i.node = u.k8s_node_name
    GROUP BY i.k8s_cluster
) mem ON v.cluster = mem.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT
        usage.cluster,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(usage.used AS VARCHAR), ' / ',
            CAST(alloc.allocatable AS VARCHAR), ' (',
            ROUND(usage.used * 100.0 / NULLIF(alloc.allocatable, 0), 1), '%)'
        ) AS pod_usage_capacity
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_cluster AS cluster,
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase IN ('Running', 'Pending') AND value = 1 THEN pod END) AS used
        FROM kube_pod_status_phase
        GROUP BY k8s_cluster
    ) AS usage
    JOIN (
        SELECT k8s_cluster, CAST(SUM(latest) AS BIGINT) AS allocatable
        FROM (
            SELECT k8s_cluster, node, MAX(value) AS latest
            FROM kube_node_status_allocatable
            WHERE resource = 'pods'
            GROUP BY k8s_cluster, node
        ) AS per_node
        GROUP BY k8s_cluster
    ) AS alloc ON usage.cluster = alloc.k8s_cluster
) pod ON v.cluster = pod.cluster
WHERE v.cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY v.cluster

panels.title: CPU Capacity

queries.query:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(a.max_val * u.avg_util), 2) AS cpu_usage_cores,
  ROUND(SUM(a.max_val), 2)              AS allocatable_cores
FROM (
  SELECT node, MAX(value) AS max_val
  FROM kube_node_status_allocatable
  WHERE resource = 'cpu' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
  GROUP BY node
) AS a
JOIN (
  -- avg per state first, then sum states → total non-idle fraction per node
  SELECT k8s_node_name, SUM(avg_state) AS avg_util
  FROM (
    SELECT k8s_node_name, AVG(value) AS avg_state
    FROM system_cpu_utilization
    WHERE state IN ('user', 'system', 'softirq', 'interrupt', 'steal', 'nice', 'irq')
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
    GROUP BY k8s_node_name, state
  )
  GROUP BY k8s_node_name
) AS u ON a.node = u.k8s_node_name

panels.title: Memory Capacity

queries.query:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(a.max_val * u.avg_util) / 1073741824, 2) AS mem_usage_gib,
  ROUND(SUM(a.max_val) / 1073741824, 2) AS allocatable_gib
FROM (
  SELECT node, MAX(value) AS max_val
  FROM kube_node_status_allocatable
  WHERE resource = 'memory' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
  GROUP BY node
) AS a
JOIN (
  SELECT k8s_node_name, AVG(value) AS avg_util
  FROM system_memory_utilization
  WHERE state = 'used' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
  GROUP BY k8s_node_name
) AS u ON a.node = u.k8s_node_name

panels.title: Pod Capacity

queries.query:
SELECT
  usage.pod_usage        AS usage,
  alloc.allocatable      AS allocatable_capacity
FROM (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(pod, '/', namespace)) AS pod_usage
  FROM kube_pod_status_phase
  WHERE k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
    AND phase IN ('Running', 'Pending')
    AND value = 1
) AS usage
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT CAST(SUM(latest) AS BIGINT) AS allocatable
  FROM (
    SELECT node, MAX(value) AS latest
    FROM kube_node_status_allocatable
    WHERE resource = 'pods' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
    GROUP BY node
  ) AS per_node
) AS alloc

panels.title: CPU Usage

queries.query:
SELECT
  k8s_pod_name,
  ROUND(AVG(value) * 1000, 2) AS cpu_mcores
FROM "k8s_pod_cpu_usage"
WHERE k8s_pod_name != '' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY k8s_pod_name
ORDER BY cpu_mcores DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Memory Usage

queries.query:
SELECT
  k8s_pod_name,
  ROUND(AVG(value) / 1048576, 2) AS memory_mib
FROM "k8s_pod_memory_usage"
WHERE k8s_pod_name != '' AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY k8s_pod_name
ORDER BY memory_mib DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Node Overview

queries.query:
SELECT 
    a.k8s_cluster,
    a.node,
    a.condition as status,
    b.kubelet_version,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(c.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
        FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(c.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
    ) as age,
    pod_stats.status as pod_statuses,
    cpu_stats.cpu_usage_capacity,
    mem_stats.mem_usage_capacity
FROM kube_node_status_condition a
JOIN (
    SELECT node, MAX(kubelet_version) as kubelet_version 
    FROM kube_node_info 
    GROUP BY node, k8s_cluster
) b ON a.node = b.node
JOIN (
    SELECT node, MAX(value) as value
    FROM kube_node_created
    GROUP BY node
) c ON a.node = c.node
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        i.node,
        CONCAT(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Running'   AND p.value = 1 THEN i.pod END), ' (running) ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Pending'   AND p.value = 1 THEN i.pod END), ' (pending) ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Failed'    AND p.value = 1 THEN i.pod END), ' (failed) ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Succeeded' AND p.value = 1 THEN i.pod END), ' (succeeded)'
        ) AS status
    FROM kube_pod_info i
    JOIN kube_pod_status_phase p 
        ON i.pod = p.pod AND i.namespace = p.namespace
    GROUP BY i.node
) pod_stats ON a.node = pod_stats.node
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        a2.node,
        CONCAT(ROUND((1 - AVG(u.value)) * 100, 2), '% / ', MAX(a2.value), ' cores') AS cpu_usage_capacity
    FROM kube_node_status_allocatable a2
    JOIN system_cpu_utilization u ON a2.node = u.k8s_node_name
    WHERE a2.resource = 'cpu' AND u.state = 'idle'
    GROUP BY a2.node
) cpu_stats ON a.node = cpu_stats.node
JOIN (
  SELECT
    a3.node,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(mem_used.avg_used * 100, 2), '% / ',
      ROUND(a3.max_val / 1073741824, 1), ' GB'
    ) AS mem_usage_capacity
  FROM (
    SELECT node, MAX(value) AS max_val
    FROM kube_node_status_allocatable
    WHERE resource = 'memory'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
    GROUP BY node
  ) AS a3
  JOIN (
    SELECT k8s_node_name, AVG(value) AS avg_used
    FROM system_memory_utilization
    WHERE state = 'used'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
    GROUP BY k8s_node_name
  ) AS mem_used ON a3.node = mem_used.k8s_node_name
) mem_stats ON a.node = mem_stats.node

WHERE a.value = 1 AND a.status = 'true' AND a.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY a.k8s_cluster, a.node, a.condition, b.kubelet_version, c.value, pod_stats.status, cpu_stats.cpu_usage_capacity, mem_stats.mem_usage_capacity
ORDER BY a.node

panels.title: Namespaces

queries.query:
SELECT 
    ns.namespace,
    ns.cluster,
    ns.status,
    p.pod_statuses,
    c.containers,
    cpu.cpu_mcores,
    mem.mem_mib,
    age.age_days
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster, phase AS status
    FROM kube_namespace_status_phase
    WHERE value = 1
) ns
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Running'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (running) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Pending'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (pending) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Failed'    AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (failed) | ',
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Succeeded' AND value = 1 THEN pod END), ' (succeeded)'
        ) AS pod_statuses
    FROM kube_pod_status_phase
    GROUP BY namespace, k8s_cluster
) p ON ns.namespace = p.namespace AND ns.cluster = p.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        COUNT(DISTINCT container) AS containers
    FROM kube_pod_container_status_ready
    GROUP BY namespace, k8s_cluster
) c ON ns.namespace = c.namespace AND ns.cluster = c.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        ROUND(SUM(avg_cpu) * 1000, 2) AS cpu_mcores
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, k8s_pod_name, AVG(value) AS avg_cpu
        FROM k8s_pod_cpu_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, k8s_pod_name
    )
    GROUP BY k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) cpu ON ns.namespace = cpu.namespace AND ns.cluster = cpu.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        ROUND(SUM(avg_mem) / 1048576, 2) AS mem_mib
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, k8s_pod_name, AVG(value) AS avg_mem
        FROM k8s_pod_memory_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, k8s_pod_name
    )
    GROUP BY k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) mem ON ns.namespace = mem.namespace AND ns.cluster = mem.cluster
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
            FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
        ) AS age_days
    FROM kube_namespace_created
    GROUP BY namespace, k8s_cluster, value
) age ON ns.namespace = age.namespace AND ns.cluster = age.cluster
WHERE ns.cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY ns.namespace

panels.title: Pods

queries.query:
SELECT 
    s.pod,
    s.status,
    s.cluster,
    s.namespace,
    r.ready,
    re.restarts,
    cpu.cpu_usage_limits,
    mem.mem_usage_limits,
    age.age_days
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT pod, phase AS status, k8s_cluster AS cluster, namespace
    FROM kube_pod_status_phase
    WHERE value = 1
) s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT pod, namespace,
        CONCAT(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN value = 1 THEN container END), '/',
            COUNT(DISTINCT container)
        ) AS ready
    FROM kube_pod_container_status_ready
    GROUP BY pod, namespace
) r ON s.pod = r.pod AND s.namespace = r.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster, MAX(value) AS restarts
    FROM kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total
    GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster
) re ON s.pod = re.pod AND s.namespace = re.namespace AND s.cluster = re.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name AS pod,
        cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        cpu_inner.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(AVG(cpu_inner.value) * 1000, 2), ' mcores / ',
            ROUND(MAX(l.value) * 1000, 0), ' mcores (',
            ROUND((AVG(cpu_inner.value) / NULLIF(MAX(l.value), 0)) * 100, 2), '%)'
        ) AS cpu_usage_limits
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, AVG(value) AS value
        FROM k8s_pod_cpu_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
    ) AS cpu_inner
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, SUM(max_value) AS value
        FROM (
            SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, container, MAX(value) AS max_value
            FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
            WHERE resource = 'cpu'
            GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, container
        ) AS latest
        GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster
    ) AS l ON cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name = l.pod
           AND cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name = l.namespace
           AND cpu_inner.k8s_cluster = l.k8s_cluster
    GROUP BY cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name, cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name, cpu_inner.k8s_cluster
) cpu ON s.pod = cpu.pod AND s.namespace = cpu.namespace AND s.cluster = cpu.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        mem_inner.k8s_pod_name AS pod,
        mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        mem_inner.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(AVG(mem_inner.value) / 1048576, 2), ' MiB / ',
            ROUND(MAX(l.value) / 1048576, 0), ' MiB (',
            ROUND((AVG(mem_inner.value) / NULLIF(MAX(l.value), 0)) * 100, 2), '%)'
        ) AS mem_usage_limits
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, AVG(value) AS value
        FROM k8s_pod_memory_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
    ) AS mem_inner
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, SUM(max_value) AS value
        FROM (
            SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, container, MAX(value) AS max_value
            FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
            WHERE resource = 'memory'
            GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, container
        ) AS latest
        GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster
    ) AS l ON mem_inner.k8s_pod_name = l.pod
           AND mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name = l.namespace
           AND mem_inner.k8s_cluster = l.k8s_cluster
    GROUP BY mem_inner.k8s_pod_name, mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name, mem_inner.k8s_cluster
) mem ON s.pod = mem.pod AND s.namespace = mem.namespace AND s.cluster = mem.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
            FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
        ) AS age_days
    FROM kube_pod_created
    GROUP BY pod, namespace, k8s_cluster
) age ON s.pod = age.pod AND s.namespace = age.namespace AND s.cluster = age.cluster
WHERE s.cluster IN (${k8s_cluster}) AND s.namespace IN (${namespace})
ORDER BY s.pod

panels.title: Containers

queries.query:
SELECT
    s.container,
    s.pod,
    s.namespace,
    s.cluster,
    img.image,
    st.status,
    re.restarts,
    cpu_limit.cpu_limit_millicores,
    mem_limit.mem_limit_mib,
    cpu_usage.cpu_pct,
    mem_usage.mem_pct,
    net.net_rx_bytes,
    net.net_tx_bytes,
    age.age
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT container, pod, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster
    FROM kube_pod_container_status_ready
) s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT container, pod, namespace, image
    FROM kube_pod_container_info
) img ON s.container = img.container AND s.pod = img.pod AND s.namespace = img.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        r.container,
        r.pod,
        r.namespace,
        CASE
            WHEN r.value = 1 THEN 'Running'
            WHEN w.value = 1 THEN 'Waiting'
            ELSE 'Terminated'
        END AS status
    FROM (
        SELECT container, pod, namespace, MAX(value) AS value
        FROM kube_pod_container_status_ready
        GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
    ) AS r
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT container, pod, namespace, MAX(value) AS value
        FROM kube_pod_container_status_waiting
        GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
    ) AS w ON r.container = w.container AND r.pod = w.pod AND r.namespace = w.namespace
) st ON s.container = st.container AND s.pod = st.pod AND s.namespace = st.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT container, pod, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster, MAX(value) AS restarts
    FROM kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total
    GROUP BY container, pod, namespace, k8s_cluster
) re ON s.container = re.container AND s.pod = re.pod AND s.namespace = re.namespace AND s.cluster = re.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT container, pod, namespace,
        ROUND(MAX(value) * 1000, 0) AS cpu_limit_millicores
    FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
    WHERE resource = 'cpu'
    GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
) cpu_limit ON s.container = cpu_limit.container AND s.pod = cpu_limit.pod AND s.namespace = cpu_limit.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT container, pod, namespace,
        ROUND(MAX(value) / 1048576, 1) AS mem_limit_mib
    FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
    WHERE resource = 'memory'
    GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
) mem_limit ON s.container = mem_limit.container AND s.pod = mem_limit.pod AND s.namespace = mem_limit.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        cpu_inner.k8s_container_name AS container,
        cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name AS pod,
        cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        ROUND((AVG(cpu_inner.value) / NULLIF(MAX(l.limit_value), 0)) * 100, 2) AS cpu_pct
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_container_name, k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, AVG(value) AS value
        FROM container_cpu_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_container_name, k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name
    ) AS cpu_inner
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT container, pod, namespace, MAX(value) AS limit_value
        FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
        WHERE resource = 'cpu'
        GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
    ) AS l ON cpu_inner.k8s_container_name = l.container AND cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name = l.pod AND cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name = l.namespace
    GROUP BY cpu_inner.k8s_container_name, cpu_inner.k8s_pod_name, cpu_inner.k8s_namespace_name
) cpu_usage ON s.container = cpu_usage.container AND s.pod = cpu_usage.pod AND s.namespace = cpu_usage.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        mem_inner.k8s_container_name AS container,
        mem_inner.k8s_pod_name AS pod,
        mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        ROUND((AVG(mem_inner.value) / NULLIF(MAX(l.limit_value), 0)) * 100, 2) AS mem_pct
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_container_name, k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, AVG(value) AS value
        FROM container_memory_usage
        GROUP BY k8s_container_name, k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name
    ) AS mem_inner
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT container, pod, namespace, MAX(value) AS limit_value
        FROM kube_pod_container_resource_limits
        WHERE resource = 'memory'
        GROUP BY container, pod, namespace
    ) AS l ON mem_inner.k8s_container_name = l.container AND mem_inner.k8s_pod_name = l.pod AND mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name = l.namespace
    GROUP BY mem_inner.k8s_container_name, mem_inner.k8s_pod_name, mem_inner.k8s_namespace_name
) mem_usage ON s.container = mem_usage.container AND s.pod = mem_usage.pod AND s.namespace = mem_usage.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        k8s_pod_name AS pod,
        k8s_namespace_name AS namespace,
        CASE
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) >= 1073741824 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) / 1073741824.0, 2), ' GiB')
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) >= 1048576    THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) / 1048576.0,    2), ' MiB')
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) >= 1024       THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END) / 1024.0,       2), ' KiB')
            ELSE                                                                            CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'receive'  THEN avg_val END), 0),                 ' B')
        END AS net_rx_bytes,
        CASE
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) >= 1073741824 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) / 1073741824.0, 2), ' GiB')
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) >= 1048576    THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) / 1048576.0,    2), ' MiB')
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) >= 1024       THEN CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END) / 1024.0,       2), ' KiB')
            ELSE                                                                            CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN direction = 'transmit' THEN avg_val END), 0),                 ' B')
        END AS net_tx_bytes
    FROM (
        SELECT k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, direction, AVG(value) AS avg_val
        FROM k8s_pod_network_io
        GROUP BY k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, direction
    ) AS t
    GROUP BY k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name
) net ON s.pod = net.pod AND s.namespace = net.namespace

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        c.container,
        c.pod,
        c.namespace,
        CONCAT(
            FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(p.created AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
            FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(p.created AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
        ) AS age
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT container, pod, namespace FROM kube_pod_container_status_ready
    ) AS c
    JOIN (
        SELECT pod, namespace, MAX(value) AS created
        FROM kube_pod_created
        GROUP BY pod, namespace
    ) AS p ON c.pod = p.pod AND c.namespace = p.namespace
) age ON s.container = age.container AND s.pod = age.pod AND s.namespace = age.namespace
WHERE s.cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY s.namespace, s.pod, s.container

panels.title: Replicat Sets

queries.query:
SELECT
    rs.replicaset,
    rs.namespace,
    rs.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    o.deployment,
    rev.revision,
    MAX(rs.value) AS current_replicas,
    MAX(sp.value) AS desired_replicas,
    MAX(r.value)  AS ready_replicas,
    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(p.running, 0), ' (running) ',
        COALESCE(p.pending, 0), ' (pending) ',
        COALESCE(p.failed, 0), ' (failed)'
    ) AS pod_statuses,
    age.age
FROM (
    SELECT replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_replicaset_status_replicas
    GROUP BY replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS rs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_replicaset_spec_replicas
    GROUP BY replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS sp ON rs.replicaset = sp.replicaset AND rs.namespace = sp.namespace AND rs.k8s_cluster = sp.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_replicaset_status_ready_replicas
    GROUP BY replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS r ON rs.replicaset = r.replicaset AND rs.namespace = r.namespace AND rs.k8s_cluster = r.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster, owner_name AS deployment
    FROM kube_replicaset_owner
    WHERE owner_kind = 'Deployment'
) AS o ON rs.replicaset = o.replicaset AND rs.namespace = o.namespace AND rs.k8s_cluster = o.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        annotation_deployment_kubernetes_io_revision AS revision
    FROM kube_replicaset_annotations
) AS rev ON rs.replicaset = rev.replicaset AND rs.namespace = rev.namespace AND rs.k8s_cluster = rev.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        o2.owner_name AS replicaset,
        o2.namespace,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Running' AND p.value = 1 THEN o2.pod END) AS running,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Pending' AND p.value = 1 THEN o2.pod END) AS pending,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Failed'  AND p.value = 1 THEN o2.pod END) AS failed
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, namespace, owner_name
        FROM kube_pod_owner
        WHERE owner_kind = 'ReplicaSet'
    ) AS o2
    JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, namespace, phase, value
        FROM kube_pod_status_phase
    ) AS p ON o2.pod = p.pod AND o2.namespace = p.namespace
    GROUP BY o2.owner_name, o2.namespace
) p ON rs.replicaset = p.replicaset AND rs.namespace = p.namespace
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        replicaset,
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
            FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
        ) AS age
    FROM kube_replicaset_created
    GROUP BY replicaset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) age ON rs.replicaset = age.replicaset AND rs.namespace = age.namespace AND rs.k8s_cluster = age.cluster
WHERE rs.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY rs.replicaset, rs.namespace, rs.k8s_cluster, o.deployment, rev.revision, p.running, p.pending, p.failed, age.age
ORDER BY rs.namespace, rs.replicaset

panels.title: Cron Jobs

queries.query:
SELECT
    ci.cronjob,
    ci.namespace,
    ci.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    ci.schedule,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(sp.suspend_val, 0) = 1 THEN 'Suspended' ELSE 'Active' END AS suspend,
    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(ps.running, 0), ' running | ',
        COALESCE(ps.pending, 0), ' pending | ',
        COALESCE(ps.failed, 0), ' failed'
    ) AS pod_statuses,
    COALESCE(ac.active_jobs, 0) AS active_jobs,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(cr.value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster, schedule
    FROM kube_cronjob_info
) AS ci
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS suspend_val
    FROM kube_cronjob_spec_suspend
    GROUP BY cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS sp ON ci.cronjob = sp.cronjob AND ci.namespace = sp.namespace AND ci.k8s_cluster = sp.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS active_jobs
    FROM kube_cronjob_status_active
    GROUP BY cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS ac ON ci.cronjob = ac.cronjob AND ci.namespace = ac.namespace AND ci.k8s_cluster = ac.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        jowner.owner_name AS cronjob,
        p.namespace,
        p.k8s_cluster,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Running' THEN p.pod END) AS running,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Pending' THEN p.pod END) AS pending,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Failed'  THEN p.pod END) AS failed
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, phase, namespace, k8s_cluster
        FROM kube_pod_status_phase WHERE value = 1
    ) AS p
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, owner_name AS job_name
        FROM kube_pod_owner WHERE owner_kind = 'Job'
    ) AS powner ON p.pod = powner.pod AND p.namespace = powner.namespace AND p.k8s_cluster = powner.k8s_cluster
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, owner_name
        FROM kube_job_owner WHERE owner_kind = 'CronJob'
    ) AS jowner ON powner.job_name = jowner.job_name AND powner.namespace = jowner.namespace AND powner.k8s_cluster = jowner.k8s_cluster
    GROUP BY jowner.owner_name, p.namespace, p.k8s_cluster
) AS ps ON ci.cronjob = ps.cronjob AND ci.namespace = ps.namespace AND ci.k8s_cluster = ps.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_cronjob_created
    GROUP BY cronjob, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cr ON ci.cronjob = cr.cronjob AND ci.namespace = cr.namespace AND ci.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
WHERE ci.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY ci.cronjob, ci.namespace, ci.k8s_cluster, ci.schedule, sp.suspend_val, ps.running, ps.pending, ps.failed, ac.active_jobs
ORDER BY ci.namespace, ci.cronjob

panels.title: Jobs

queries.query:
SELECT
    j.job_name,
    j.namespace,
    j.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    CONCAT(COALESCE(suc.value, 0), ' / ', COALESCE(comp.value, 0)) AS status,
    COALESCE(comp.value, 0) AS completions,
    COALESCE(par.value, 0) AS parallelism,
    CASE WHEN ad.value IS NULL THEN '—' ELSE CAST(CAST(ad.value AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR) END AS active_deadline_sec,
    COALESCE(suc.value, 0) AS succeeded,
    COALESCE(fail.value, 0) AS failed,
    COALESCE(act.value, 0) AS active,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(j.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days'
    ) AS age,
    CASE
        WHEN ct.value IS NOT NULL AND st.value IS NOT NULL THEN
            CASE
                WHEN CAST(ct.value AS BIGINT) - CAST(st.value AS BIGINT) >= 3600
                    THEN CONCAT(FLOOR((CAST(ct.value AS BIGINT) - CAST(st.value AS BIGINT)) / 3600), ' hours')
                WHEN CAST(ct.value AS BIGINT) - CAST(st.value AS BIGINT) >= 60
                    THEN CONCAT(FLOOR((CAST(ct.value AS BIGINT) - CAST(st.value AS BIGINT)) / 60), ' min')
                ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ct.value AS BIGINT) - CAST(st.value AS BIGINT), ' sec')
            END
        ELSE '—'
    END AS duration
FROM (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_created
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS j
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_spec_completions
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS comp ON j.job_name = comp.job_name AND j.namespace = comp.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = comp.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_spec_parallelism
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS par ON j.job_name = par.job_name AND j.namespace = par.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = par.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_spec_active_deadline_seconds
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS ad ON j.job_name = ad.job_name AND j.namespace = ad.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = ad.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_status_succeeded
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS suc ON j.job_name = suc.job_name AND j.namespace = suc.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = suc.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_status_failed
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS fail ON j.job_name = fail.job_name AND j.namespace = fail.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = fail.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_status_active
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS act ON j.job_name = act.job_name AND j.namespace = act.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = act.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_status_start_time
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS st ON j.job_name = st.job_name AND j.namespace = st.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = st.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_job_status_completion_time
    GROUP BY job_name, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS ct ON j.job_name = ct.job_name AND j.namespace = ct.namespace AND j.k8s_cluster = ct.k8s_cluster
WHERE j.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY j.namespace, j.job_name

panels.title: Daemon Sets

queries.query:
SELECT
    d.daemonset,
    d.namespace,
    d.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(COALESCE(rdy.value, 0) AS BIGINT), ' ready | ',
        CAST(COALESCE(avail.value, 0) AS BIGINT), ' available'
    ) AS status,
    CAST(d.value AS BIGINT) AS desired,
    CAST(COALESCE(cur.value, 0) AS BIGINT) AS current,
    CAST(COALESCE(upd.value, 0) AS BIGINT) AS up_to_date,
    CAST(COALESCE(rdy.value, 0) AS BIGINT) AS ready,
    CAST(COALESCE(avail.value, 0) AS BIGINT) AS available,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS d
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_status_current_number_scheduled
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cur ON d.daemonset = cur.daemonset AND d.namespace = cur.namespace AND d.k8s_cluster = cur.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_status_updated_number_scheduled
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS upd ON d.daemonset = upd.daemonset AND d.namespace = upd.namespace AND d.k8s_cluster = upd.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_status_number_ready
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS rdy ON d.daemonset = rdy.daemonset AND d.namespace = rdy.namespace AND d.k8s_cluster = rdy.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_status_number_available
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS avail ON d.daemonset = avail.daemonset AND d.namespace = avail.namespace AND d.k8s_cluster = avail.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_daemonset_created
    GROUP BY daemonset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cr ON d.daemonset = cr.daemonset AND d.namespace = cr.namespace AND d.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
WHERE d.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY d.namespace, d.daemonset

panels.title: Stateful Sets

queries.query:
SELECT
    s.statefulset,
    s.namespace,
    s.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    '—' AS service,
    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(ps.running, 0), ' running | ',
        COALESCE(ps.pending, 0), ' pending | ',
        COALESCE(ps.failed, 0), ' failed'
    ) AS pod_statuses,
    '—' AS pod_policy,
    COALESCE(cur.value, 0) AS current,
    s.value AS desired,
    COALESCE(rdy.value, 0) AS ready,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_statefulset_replicas
    GROUP BY statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_statefulset_status_replicas_current
    GROUP BY statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cur ON s.statefulset = cur.statefulset AND s.namespace = cur.namespace AND s.k8s_cluster = cur.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_statefulset_status_replicas_ready
    GROUP BY statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS rdy ON s.statefulset = rdy.statefulset AND s.namespace = rdy.namespace AND s.k8s_cluster = rdy.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        po.owner_name AS statefulset,
        po.namespace,
        po.k8s_cluster,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Running' THEN p.pod END) AS running,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Pending' THEN p.pod END) AS pending,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.phase = 'Failed'  THEN p.pod END) AS failed
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, phase, namespace, k8s_cluster
        FROM kube_pod_status_phase WHERE value = 1
    ) AS p
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT pod, namespace, k8s_cluster, owner_name
        FROM kube_pod_owner WHERE owner_kind = 'StatefulSet'
    ) AS po ON p.pod = po.pod AND p.namespace = po.namespace AND p.k8s_cluster = po.k8s_cluster
    GROUP BY po.owner_name, po.namespace, po.k8s_cluster
) AS ps ON s.statefulset = ps.statefulset AND s.namespace = ps.namespace AND s.k8s_cluster = ps.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_statefulset_created
    GROUP BY statefulset, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cr ON s.statefulset = cr.statefulset AND s.namespace = cr.namespace AND s.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
WHERE cr.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY s.namespace, s.statefulset

panels.title: Deployments

queries.query:
SELECT 
    r.deployment,
    r.namespace,
    r.cluster,
    r.desired,
    r.available,
    r.unavailable,
    r.rollout_status,
    r.availability,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.desired = 0 AND COALESCE(r.available, 0) = 0 THEN 'Stopped'
        WHEN COALESCE(r.available, 0) >= r.desired AND COALESCE(r.unavailable, 0) = 0 THEN 'Running'
        WHEN COALESCE(r.unavailable, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(r.available, 0) > 0 THEN 'Degraded'
        WHEN COALESCE(r.available, 0) = 0 AND r.desired > 0 THEN 'Pending'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS status,
    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(p.running, 0), ' (running) | ',
        COALESCE(p.pending, 0), ' (pending) | ',
        COALESCE(p.failed, 0), ' (failed)'
    ) AS pod_statuses,
    cr.current_replicas,
    age.age_days
FROM (
    SELECT 
        spec.deployment,
        spec.namespace,
        spec.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        spec.value AS desired,
        COALESCE(avail.value, 0) AS available,
        COALESCE(unavail.value, 0) AS unavailable,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(unavail.value, 0) > 0 THEN 'FAILED'
            WHEN COALESCE(updated.value, 0) >= spec.value THEN 'COMPLETED'
            ELSE 'IN PROGRESS'
        END AS rollout_status,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(avail.value, 0) > 0 THEN 'AVAILABLE'
            ELSE 'UNAVAILABLE'
        END AS availability
    FROM (
        SELECT deployment, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value 
        FROM kube_deployment_spec_replicas
        GROUP BY deployment, namespace, k8s_cluster
    ) AS spec
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT deployment, namespace, MAX(value) AS value 
        FROM kube_deployment_status_replicas_available
        GROUP BY deployment, namespace
    ) AS avail ON spec.deployment = avail.deployment AND spec.namespace = avail.namespace
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT deployment, namespace, MAX(value) AS value 
        FROM kube_deployment_status_replicas_unavailable 
        GROUP BY deployment, namespace
    ) AS unavail ON spec.deployment = unavail.deployment AND spec.namespace = unavail.namespace
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT deployment, namespace, MAX(value) AS value 
        FROM kube_deployment_status_replicas_updated
        GROUP BY deployment, namespace
    ) AS updated ON spec.deployment = updated.deployment AND spec.namespace = updated.namespace
) r
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        REGEXP_REPLACE(pod, '-[^-]+-[^-]+$', '') AS deployment,
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Running'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END) AS running,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Pending'   AND value = 1 THEN pod END) AS pending,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN phase = 'Failed'    AND value = 1 THEN pod END) AS failed
    FROM kube_pod_status_phase
    GROUP BY REGEXP_REPLACE(pod, '-[^-]+-[^-]+$', ''), namespace, k8s_cluster
) p ON r.deployment = p.deployment AND r.namespace = p.namespace AND r.cluster = p.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        deployment,
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        MAX(value) AS current_replicas
    FROM kube_deployment_status_replicas_available
    GROUP BY deployment, namespace, k8s_cluster
) cr ON r.deployment = cr.deployment AND r.namespace = cr.namespace AND r.cluster = cr.cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        deployment,
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster AS cluster,
        CONCAT(
            FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days ',
            FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), ' hours'
        ) AS age_days
    FROM kube_deployment_created
    GROUP BY deployment, namespace, k8s_cluster
) age ON r.deployment = age.deployment AND r.namespace = age.namespace AND r.cluster = age.cluster
WHERE r.cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})

panels.title: Services

SELECT
    i.service,
    i.namespace,
    i.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    t."type",
    i.cluster_ip,

    CONCAT(
        COALESCE(ep.ready_pods, 0), ' (ready) | ',
        COALESCE(ep.not_ready_pods, 0), ' (not ready)'
    ) AS pod_status,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(cr.value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), 'd ',
        FLOOR((CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(MAX(cr.value) AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) % 86400) / 3600), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT service, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(cluster_ip) AS cluster_ip
    FROM "kube_service_info"
    GROUP BY service, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT service, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX("type") AS "type"
    FROM "kube_service_spec_type"
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY service, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS t ON i.service = t.service AND i.namespace = t.namespace AND i.k8s_cluster = t.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT service, namespace, k8s_cluster,
           string_agg(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(ip, ''), hostname), ', ') AS ip
    FROM "kube_service_status_load_balancer_ingress"
    GROUP BY service, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS lb ON i.service = lb.service AND i.namespace = lb.namespace AND i.k8s_cluster = lb.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        endpoint,
        namespace,
        k8s_cluster,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ready = 'true'  THEN ip END) AS ready_pods,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ready = 'false' THEN ip END) AS not_ready_pods

panels.title: Network Policies

queries.query:
SELECT
    np.networkpolicy,
    np.namespace,
    np.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    '—' AS selector,
    CONCAT(COALESCE(ing.value, 0), ' rule(s)') AS ingress_rules,
    CONCAT(COALESCE(eg.value, 0), ' rule(s)') AS egress_rules,
    CONCAT(
        FLOOR(CAST(NOW() - FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) / 86400), ' days'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_networkpolicy_created
    GROUP BY networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS np
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_networkpolicy_spec_ingress_rules
    GROUP BY networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS ing ON np.networkpolicy = ing.networkpolicy AND np.namespace = ing.namespace AND np.k8s_cluster = ing.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_networkpolicy_spec_egress_rules
    GROUP BY networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS eg ON np.networkpolicy = eg.networkpolicy AND np.namespace = eg.namespace AND np.k8s_cluster = eg.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_networkpolicy_created
    GROUP BY networkpolicy, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cr ON np.networkpolicy = cr.networkpolicy AND np.namespace = cr.namespace AND np.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
WHERE cr.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY np.namespace, np.networkpolicy

panels.title: Persistent Volume Claims

queries.query:
SELECT
    i.persistentvolumeclaim AS pvc,
    i.namespace,
    i.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    COALESCE(ph.phase, '—') AS phase,
    COALESCE(i.storageclass, '—') AS storage_class,
    COALESCE(i.volumename, '—') AS persistent_volume,
    COALESCE(am.access_modes, '—') AS access_modes,
    COALESCE(po.attached_pods, '—') AS attached_pods,
    CASE
        WHEN req.value IS NULL THEN '—'
        WHEN req.value >= 1073741824 THEN CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(req.value / 1073741824.0, 1) AS VARCHAR), ' Gi')
        ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(req.value / 1048576.0, 0) AS VARCHAR), ' Mi')
    END AS requested_capacity,
    CASE
        WHEN cap.value IS NULL THEN '—'
        WHEN cap.value >= 1073741824 THEN CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(cap.value / 1073741824.0, 1) AS VARCHAR), ' Gi')
        ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(cap.value / 1048576.0, 0) AS VARCHAR), ' Mi')
    END AS capacity,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT i.persistentvolumeclaim, i.namespace, i.k8s_cluster, i.storageclass, i.volumename
    FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info i
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(_timestamp) AS max_ts
        FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info
        GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster
    ) AS latest
        ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = latest.persistentvolumeclaim
        AND i.namespace = latest.namespace
        AND i.k8s_cluster = latest.k8s_cluster
        AND i._timestamp = latest.max_ts
    GROUP BY i.persistentvolumeclaim, i.namespace, i.k8s_cluster, i.storageclass, i.volumename
) AS i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster, phase
    FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster, phase
) AS ph
    ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = ph.persistentvolumeclaim
    AND i.namespace = ph.namespace
    AND i.k8s_cluster = ph.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster,
        string_agg(DISTINCT access_mode, ' | ') AS access_modes
    FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_access_mode
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS am
    ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = am.persistentvolumeclaim
    AND i.namespace = am.namespace
    AND i.k8s_cluster = am.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster,
           string_agg(DISTINCT pod, ', ') AS attached_pods
    FROM kube_pod_spec_volumes_persistentvolumeclaims_info
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS po
    ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = po.persistentvolumeclaim
    AND i.namespace = po.namespace
    AND i.k8s_cluster = po.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_resource_requests_storage_bytes
    GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS req
    ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = req.persistentvolumeclaim
    AND i.namespace = req.namespace
    AND i.k8s_cluster = req.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_persistentvolumeclaim_created
    GROUP BY persistentvolumeclaim, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cr
    ON i.persistentvolumeclaim = cr.persistentvolumeclaim
    AND i.namespace = cr.namespace
    AND i.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolume, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_persistentvolume_capacity_bytes
    GROUP BY persistentvolume
) AS cap
    ON i.volumename = cap.persistentvolume
WHERE i.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY i.namespace, i.persistentvolumeclaim

panels.title: Persistent Volumes

queries.query:
SELECT
    i.persistentvolume AS pv,
    i.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    COALESCE(ph.phase, '—') AS phase,
    COALESCE(i.storageclass, '—') AS storage_class,
    COALESCE(obj.type, '—') AS type,
    COALESCE(obj.access_modes, '—') AS access_modes,
    COALESCE(obj.reclaim_policy, '—') AS reclaim_policy,
    CASE
        WHEN cap.value IS NULL THEN '—'
        WHEN cap.value >= 1073741824 THEN CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(cap.value / 1073741824.0, 1) AS VARCHAR), ' Gi')
        ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(cap.value / 1048576.0, 0) AS VARCHAR), ' Mi')
    END AS capacity,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(cr.value AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT persistentvolume, k8s_cluster, storageclass
    FROM metrics.kube_persistentvolume_info
) AS i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolume, k8s_cluster, phase
    FROM metrics.kube_persistentvolume_status_phase
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY persistentvolume, k8s_cluster, phase
) AS ph
    ON i.persistentvolume = ph.persistentvolume
    AND i.k8s_cluster = ph.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolume, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM metrics.kube_persistentvolume_capacity_bytes
    GROUP BY persistentvolume, k8s_cluster
) AS cap
    ON i.persistentvolume = cap.persistentvolume
    AND i.k8s_cluster = cap.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT persistentvolume, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM metrics.kube_persistentvolume_created
    GROUP BY persistentvolume, k8s_cluster
) AS cr
    ON i.persistentvolume = cr.persistentvolume
    AND i.k8s_cluster = cr.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        event_name AS persistentvolume,
        k8s_cluster,
        MAX(CASE
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%"csi":{%'                  THEN 'CSI'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%"hostPath":{%'             THEN 'hostPath'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%"nfs":{%'                  THEN 'NFS'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%"awsElasticBlockStore":{%' THEN 'EBS'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%"azureDisk":{%'            THEN 'AzureDisk'
            ELSE '—'
        END) AS type,
        MAX(CASE
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteOncePod%'                                          THEN 'ReadWriteOncePod'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteOnce%' AND body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteMany%' THEN 'ReadWriteOnce | ReadWriteMany'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteOnce%' AND body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadOnlyMany%'  THEN 'ReadWriteOnce | ReadOnlyMany'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteOnce%'                                             THEN 'ReadWriteOnce'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadWriteMany%'                                             THEN 'ReadWriteMany'
            WHEN body_object_spec LIKE '%ReadOnlyMany%'                                              THEN 'ReadOnlyMany'
            ELSE '—'
        END) AS access_modes,
        MAX(regexp_match(body_object_spec, '"persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy":"([^"]+)"')[1]) AS reclaim_policy
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'PersistentVolume'
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
    GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster
) AS obj
    ON i.persistentvolume = obj.persistentvolume
    AND i.k8s_cluster = obj.k8s_cluster
WHERE i.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY i.k8s_cluster, i.persistentvolume

panels.title: Service Accounts

queries.query:
SELECT
    e.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    e.event_name AS service_account,
    COALESCE(regexp_match(e.body_object_metadata, '"namespace":"([^"]+)"')[1], '—') AS namespace,
    'true' AS automount_token,   -- defaults to true when not explicitly set
    '—' AS secrets_names,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(
                regexp_match(e.body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1]
            )) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(
                regexp_match(e.body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1]
            )) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM logs.k8s_events e
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT event_name, k8s_cluster, MAX(_timestamp) AS max_ts
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'ServiceAccount'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
    GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster
) AS latest
    ON e.event_name = latest.event_name
    AND e.k8s_cluster = latest.k8s_cluster
    AND e._timestamp = latest.max_ts
WHERE e.body_object_kind = 'ServiceAccount'
  AND e.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
ORDER BY namespace, service_account

panels.title: Cluster Roles

queries.query:
SELECT
    event_name AS cluster_role,
    k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    MAX(body_object_rules) AS rules,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT
        event_name,
        k8s_cluster,
        body_object_rules,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS creation_ts
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'ClusterRole'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
) AS r
GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster
ORDER BY cluster, cluster_role

panels.title: Roles

queries.query:
SELECT
    event_name AS role,
    k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    namespace,
    MAX(body_object_rules) AS rules,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT
        event_name,
        k8s_cluster,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"namespace":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS namespace,
        body_object_rules,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS creation_ts
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'Role'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
) AS r
GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster, namespace
ORDER BY cluster, namespace, role

panels.title: Role Bindings

queries.query:
SELECT
    event_name AS role_binding,
    k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    namespace,
    CONCAT(
        regexp_match(body_object_roleref, '"kind":"([^"]+)"')[1], ': ',
        regexp_match(body_object_roleref, '"name":"([^"]+)"')[1]
    ) AS role,
    body_object_subjects AS subjects,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT
        event_name,
        k8s_cluster,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"namespace":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS namespace,
        body_object_roleref,
        body_object_subjects,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS creation_ts
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'RoleBinding'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
) AS r
GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster, namespace, body_object_roleref, body_object_subjects
ORDER BY cluster, namespace, role_binding

panels.title: Cluster Role Bindings

queries.query:
SELECT
    event_name AS cluster_role_binding,
    k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    CONCAT(
        regexp_match(body_object_roleref, '"kind":"([^"]+)"')[1], ': ',
        regexp_match(body_object_roleref, '"name":"([^"]+)"')[1]
    ) AS role,
    body_object_subjects AS subjects,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) -
            CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(MAX(creation_ts))) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM (
    SELECT
        event_name,
        k8s_cluster,
        body_object_roleref,
        body_object_subjects,
        regexp_match(body_object_metadata, '"creationTimestamp":"([^"]+)"')[1] AS creation_ts
    FROM logs.k8s_events
    WHERE body_object_kind = 'ClusterRoleBinding'
      AND k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
      AND _timestamp >= CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - interval '30 days') * 1000000 AS BIGINT)
) AS r
GROUP BY event_name, k8s_cluster, body_object_roleref, body_object_subjects
ORDER BY cluster, cluster_role_binding

panels.title: HPA

queries.query:
SELECT
    m.horizontalpodautoscaler AS hpa,
    m.namespace,
    m.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    CASE
        WHEN cond.not_able_to_scale = 1 THEN 'NotAbleToScale'
        WHEN cond.scaling_limited = 1   THEN 'ScalingLimited'
        WHEN cond.able_to_scale = 1     THEN 'AbleToScale'
        ELSE '—'
    END AS status,
    COALESCE(m.min_replicas, 0) AS min_replicas,
    COALESCE(max_r.max_replicas, 0) AS max_replicas,
    COALESCE(cur.current_replicas, 0) AS current_replicas,
    COALESCE(des.desired_replicas, 0) AS desired_replicas,
    COALESCE(
        string_agg(DISTINCT
            CONCAT(tm.metric_name, ' (', tm.metric_target_type, ')=', CAST(CAST(tm.value AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR)),
            ' | '
        ),
    '—') AS target_metrics
FROM (
    SELECT k8s_hpa_name AS horizontalpodautoscaler, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS min_replicas
    FROM k8s_hpa_min_replicas
    GROUP BY k8s_hpa_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) AS m
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT k8s_hpa_name AS horizontalpodautoscaler, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS max_replicas
    FROM k8s_hpa_max_replicas
    GROUP BY k8s_hpa_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) AS max_r ON m.horizontalpodautoscaler = max_r.horizontalpodautoscaler AND m.namespace = max_r.namespace AND m.k8s_cluster = max_r.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT k8s_hpa_name AS horizontalpodautoscaler, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS current_replicas
    FROM k8s_hpa_current_replicas
    GROUP BY k8s_hpa_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) AS cur ON m.horizontalpodautoscaler = cur.horizontalpodautoscaler AND m.namespace = cur.namespace AND m.k8s_cluster = cur.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT k8s_hpa_name AS horizontalpodautoscaler, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_cluster, MAX(value) AS desired_replicas
    FROM k8s_hpa_desired_replicas
    GROUP BY k8s_hpa_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster
) AS des ON m.horizontalpodautoscaler = des.horizontalpodautoscaler AND m.namespace = des.namespace AND m.k8s_cluster = des.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace, k8s_cluster, metric_name, metric_target_type, MAX(value) AS value
    FROM kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_spec_target_metric
    GROUP BY horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace, k8s_cluster, metric_name, metric_target_type
) AS tm ON m.horizontalpodautoscaler = tm.horizontalpodautoscaler AND m.namespace = tm.namespace AND m.k8s_cluster = tm.k8s_cluster
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace, k8s_cluster,
        MAX(CASE WHEN condition = 'AbleToScale'    AND status = 'false' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_able_to_scale,
        MAX(CASE WHEN condition = 'ScalingLimited' AND status = 'true'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scaling_limited,
        MAX(CASE WHEN condition = 'AbleToScale'    AND status = 'true'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS able_to_scale
    FROM kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_status_condition
    WHERE value = 1
    GROUP BY horizontalpodautoscaler, namespace, k8s_cluster
) AS cond ON m.horizontalpodautoscaler = cond.horizontalpodautoscaler AND m.namespace = cond.namespace AND m.k8s_cluster = cond.k8s_cluster
WHERE m.k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY m.horizontalpodautoscaler, m.namespace, m.k8s_cluster, m.min_replicas, max_r.max_replicas, cur.current_replicas, des.desired_replicas, cond.not_able_to_scale, cond.scaling_limited, cond.able_to_scale
ORDER BY m.namespace, m.horizontalpodautoscaler

panels.title: Custom Resource Definitions

queries.query:
SELECT
    body_metadata_name AS crd,
    k8s_cluster AS cluster,
    -- body_crd_group is promoted from spec.group by the transform/strip_crd_spec processor
    -- Falls back to deriving group from CRD name format "<plural>.<api-group>"
    COALESCE(MAX(body_crd_group), SUBSTRING(body_metadata_name FROM POSITION('.' IN body_metadata_name) + 1)) AS group,
    COALESCE(MAX(body_crd_scope), '—') AS scope,
    -- body_crd_stored_versions promoted from status.storedVersions (small string array e.g. ["v1","v1beta1"])
    -- strip JSON brackets/quotes for display
    COALESCE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MAX(body_crd_stored_versions), '["', ''), '"]', ''), '","', ', '), '—') AS versions,
    -- CRs count requires querying each CRD's own API endpoint — not available via k8sobjects
    '—' AS crs_count,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(CAST((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(MAX(body_metadata_creationtimestamp) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS BIGINT)) / 86400 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'd ',
        CAST(CAST(((CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) AS BIGINT) - CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(MAX(body_metadata_creationtimestamp) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS BIGINT)) % 86400) / 3600 AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR), 'h'
    ) AS age
FROM logs.k8s_events
WHERE body_kind = 'CustomResourceDefinition' and k8s_cluster IN (${k8s_cluster})
GROUP BY body_metadata_name, k8s_cluster
ORDER BY k8s_cluster, body_metadata_name

panels.title: CPU Usage vs Requests

queries.query:
SELECT
  k8s_pod_name,
  AVG(value) AS utilization_pct
FROM "k8s_pod_cpu_request_utilization"
WHERE k8s_pod_name != ''
GROUP BY k8s_pod_name
ORDER BY utilization_pct DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: CPU Usage vs Limits

queries.query:
SELECT u.k8s_pod_name AS pod, u.k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, u.k8s_cluster AS cluster,
  ROUND((AVG(u.value) / NULLIF(MAX(l.value), 0)) * 100, 2) AS cpu_usage_pct
FROM (SELECT k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster, AVG(value) AS value FROM "k8s_pod_cpu_usage" GROUP BY k8s_pod_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_cluster) AS u
LEFT JOIN (SELECT pod, namespace, SUM(value) AS value FROM "kube_pod_container_resource_limits" WHERE resource = 'cpu' GROUP BY pod, namespace) AS l
  ON u.k8s_pod_name = l.pod AND u.k8s_namespace_name = l.namespace
WHERE l.value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY u.k8s_pod_name, u.k8s_namespace_name, u.k8s_cluster
HAVING cpu_usage_pct IS NOT NULL AND cpu_usage_pct > 0
ORDER BY cpu_usage_pct DESC
